title: bromus agrarius subsp. diffusus
intro: Bromus agrarius subsp. diffusus, also known as the soft brome or common brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Bromus agrarius subsp. diffusus include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, and to reduce inflammation and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for its herbal remedies, and its seeds can be used as a nutritious food source.
